component.name: Avia Client
component.summary: Avia is an open-source modification of Stoat, an open-source, user-first chat platform

description.p: The Stoat client you actually want

Avia Client is a modification of Stoat, it allows for use of plugins and CSS themes with a bunch of pre-included features such as a menu for all your favorite gifs ! This Flatpak version is maintained by Raptor.

ul.li: Meet Aurora, our new mascot and logo (Created by Amelia in Procreate)
There is now an integrated Repository for plugins and themes, allowing you to browse & install them from within the client.
With the new Headliner feature, you can change the titlebar of AviaClient to anything you like
You can now fully backup and restore AviaClient's data (Themes, plugins, QuickCSS, etc)
You can now Login with a session token
Added a new About window, which can be access via the tray or by pressing F1
Monaco is now used as the default editor for Plugins, Local Plugins, Themes, and QuickCSS
Flatpak version
Many, many Quality-of-Life changes under the hood for developers
Rebranded the desktop app
Local plugins can now be imported directly from a .js file
Themes can now be imported directly from a .txt or .css file (via Drag-n-Drop too!)
The Settings UI now properly displays that this is AviaClient
You can now display the custom titlebar with the system's native menu buttons (close, minimize, maximize)
The tray icon menu now has "Restart App"
There's now an option to disable the show/hide behaviour of the tray icon upon clicking it
Plugin installation is no longer limited to GitHub URLs - we now support Codeberg as well
DevTools can now be opened by pressing F12
Exposed a method to get AviaClient version via js (window.native.versions.aviaClient())
AviaClient version is now displayed in the tray, alongside Stoat's
Discord RPC now displays AviaClient
macOS only: the default about window now uses AviaClient's version as the buildId
macOS only: Settings can now be opened and closed by pressing Cmd + ,
Fix the chatbar buttons being placed incorrectly under specific circumstances (by 0simp#2291)
Fix a rare race condition during app initialization
Fixed app badges being unable to be displayed - still needs badge logic
